author: titan
description: Standing contract — per-topic conversation bundle (arch §7 + §12.2 + §12.3, Phase 3 P3.E, D-SPEC-127). Companion to actr_user_conversation_bundle: on every sealed conversation-fork TX carrying a `topic:<X>` tag (extracted by llm_pipeline.topic_extractor at chat-turn write time, P3.C), the post-seal hook emits MAINTAIN_BUNDLE; synthesis_worker maintains a ring-buffer of the last 50 TXs per topic in association_bundles. Materializes the §7 'tag-driven sidechain is free' premise as a queryable surface: granularity=topic recall becomes a single BridgeRecall.read_bundle('topic', '<X>', 'conversation') instead of a SEARCH. entity_id_from='tag_prefix:topic:' extracts the topic name from the first `topic:` tag.
